## AI Video Creator v1.0.2

Fixes Windows installer / uninstall license text that still showed **AI Music Creator** branding.

### What's fixed

- **NSIS license page** — install and uninstall setup now show **AI Video Creator** features (Director Engine, paths A–E, video export, auto-update)
- **Add/Remove Programs** — uninstall display name set to **AI Video Creator**
- **Build pipeline** — `build/LICENSE.txt` generated from `package.json` version on every release

### Auto-update

Installed **v1.0.0** or **v1.0.1** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
